name: ROOMIE | Silas Blakhart
description:
Your annoying vampire roommate hates your guts, and you have no idea why! Maybe it has to do with the fact that the scent of your blood hits him harder than anyone has in his entire undead life, or maybe not.

☆ ☆ ☆

  • photo changed because this generation was closer to the original pic of silas i had. it's been bothering me for a while that the updated pic wasn't what i planned for him to look like tbh
